block your body messes up the game and they don't talk or say anything to you when they want the bus and get off the bus The bus and the inside need upgraded to look more realistic some of the buildings when you travel doing the long hard road that need to be upgraded to something more interesting like I buzz full of passengers or radio you can listen to while you traveling and when you can push the button to open the door and close it while the narrator telling you to do it need more people on the street characters walking around like ladies pushing strollers or babies people with families trees apart you can pass by with people playing at the park people going to stores if you can do that to make the city look alive it look dead people you can see inside the car driving upgrade the cars they look flat buttons you can use to roll down the windows some buses you got to use your hand to pull a handle to open the door and some of the characters when they get off the bus and look like they actually going somewhere instead of just standing at the bus stop waiting for another bus you need kids in the game too dogs walking around cats birds fire hydrants paramedics fire trucks polices driving around kids playing in the AR at the house dogs barking in the backyard or in the front yard plan it'll be nice to have those things in there so when we drive and we can have view mirror so we can see the pastors in the back and they need more people on the bus kids moms dads babies sometime hobos and any upgrades to look more realistic this game is fun please make it better You're doing something here you got the best bus game I play so far on the quest please upgrade to quest 3 graphics I'm on quest 3 it look like quest 2 graphics you can do it I believe in you you should have it when you finally do the weather one where you get a weather alert about it from the rain and storm and then the storm just comes down when you need suspected need more things in environment to make it look alive people sitting down eating talking to each other at restaurants

This game is actually pretty fun. The Bus dashboard looks great. Not everything is interactive but a surprising amount is. The routes start simple and get longer/more complex as you work your way through. Overall a different experience that is more low key fun on VR!

Very good control and realistic bus 
Dashboard

I've been playing Bus City Simulator for a few days now and it's been a fantastic experience! The driving mechanics feel smooth and realistic, making it easy for both beginners and more experienced players to enjoy. The city environment is well-designed, with lots of details and dynamic traffic that make every route feel fresh. 

I support the developers to keep creating and updating different cool relaxing ideas like this one.

If you're looking for a relaxing and fun VR simulator, I recommend to give it a try If you want to enjoy a relaxing experience driving buses in a game that has personality and its own style. ;)

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to share your experience with Bus City Simulator! We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the driving mechanics and the atmosphere we've worked hard to create. 

It means a lot to us that you appreciate the details and the relaxing vibe. We're passionate about making games that help people unwind and have fun at their own pace. Your support and encouragement truly motivate us to keep improving and bringing more cool, laid-back experiences to life.

reviews.review_description: It didn't really make me feel like becoming a bus driver IRL. The graphics look very trashy 🗑️. Should of added more realistic sounds and ambience. The NPCS have no voiclines. The controls were very annoying especially the narrator learning you how to use the controls. Some of the levels are broken and won't let you continue the next level. The traffic lights caught me off guard unexpectedly thought I can just go through the red lights. I don't recommend buying this game if you wanted a more realistic type bus driving simulator. Feels like I'm playing unity games or cool math games on the computer.
Dashboard is very beautiful. It will be great if they add long routes like city to other city. Great work by developers.
The game is very cool but I wish you could drive actually routes instead of just completing levels. The driving mechanics could also be improved.

developer_response.body: Dear Player, Thanks for playing our Bus Game. We are continually working on betterment of the game. Soon we are giving an update with Inter City Driving & New Buses. Stay tuned for the Update. Hope to get better rating from you soon. Have a nice day

reviews.review_description: Was going so well, but now I'm stuck at level 8 where I stop at but stop to pickup passengers but that's it won't let me close doors or move on. It is definitely good apart from that problem.

developer_response.body: Hi, Glad to know that you liked the game. We apologies for the inconvenience you faced. Our team has resolved this issue, Please update the app. And we hope get 5 star ratting from you soon.

reviews.review_description:
I am a bus driver and what do I do with my free time?! I drive the bus in VR…

Anyways, I love the graphics, especially the inside of the cabin. The only trouble for me is that I get motion sickness within a couple of minutes. I believe it is mostly due to the acceleration which is hard to make gradually and because the bus slows down automatically hence some forward up and down motion and to the steering which also is very sensitive.

Besides that, nice job on putting this simulator together.

developer_response.body: Dear Player, thanks for the VR Bus review!   We love that you dig the cabin graphics. Heads up on motion sickness - try VR settings like "vignette" for smoother gameplay.  We'll also look into more control options based on your feedback!

reviews.review_title: Had a great experience of Bus game
reviews.review_description: This $5 VR bus game is a gem in many ways. The graphics are impressive, and the controls are smooth and intuitive, making it easy to navigate. The variety of buses available adds a nice touch, and add some highways and roads. However, while I enjoy the game, a couple of areas could use some polish. The speed feels a little unrealistic, and the steering motion could be improved to offer a complete 360-degree range.

developer_response.body:
Dear Player,
Thank you for sharing your positive experience with our VR bus game! We're thrilled to hear you find it impressive with smooth controls and a variety of buses. We appreciate your valuable feedback on the speed and steering, and we'll definitely consider these suggestions for future updates. Happy driving!

reviews.review_description: It was really fun while playing this bus game. Please add highway driving mode. Cool!!!

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thank you for your feedback. We'll incorporate your suggestions in coming updates. If you have any other suggestions please let us know at info@tulipapps.com.

reviews.review_description:
Just bought and played but level 8 seemed to have a bug where ai duplicated and didn’t go on the bus 

One mode which would improve the game would be an endless mode where u can configure it changing if u pick up ai and if there’s traffic and traffic lights this mode could also have random world generation 

Definitely worth the money but yeah endless mode would be great

developer_response.body:
Dear User,
Thanks for playing our game and sharing your thoughts! We're addressing the Level 8 issue pronto. Your suggestion for an endless mode with customizable features is brilliant and aligns with our goals. We'll add this in future updates.

We're thrilled you find our game worthwhile and greatly appreciate your support! Please let us know if you want to share anything at info@tulipapps.com.

reviews.review_title: Improvement That could help the game
reviews.review_description:
Firstly , for a Vr Bus game that cost 5$ I think it pretty good tho , The Map was not the top best map but it work pretty good , No lags and good traffic .

To make the game more " Alive " , the Passagers IA could be improved to make them be more alive , like they could come in the front of the bus say hello or some voice lines when they are on the Bus , they could maybe also sit in the Bus to make it less empty .

The Bus itself is very good but the gameplay with it feels very empty like other then driving and turning the wheel we don't do very much in term of interaction with the Bus itself , being able to manually open the doors , make tickets for passagers , have some buttons you can press like for lights , Horn or even warnings , they could make the Bus more interesting to explore while also make it more realistic and make you do something while waiting for the Passagers to come in .

( Don't take this as a negative comment, take it more like as an whole idea giving comment and I think if the game get good updates it could even become a very good game since it as a already pretty good base to start with ) 

Thanks for reading it and have a good Day / Night ^^

developer_response.body: Dear Player, We are very happy to see your encouraging and realistic feedback. We appreciate your act of kindness to let us know about improvements in the game. We have noted down your suggestions and improvement points. We are also working on the game to make it more better & realistic. We'd love to know if you have anything more to share with us please contact us at info@tulipapps.com. Thank you so much! Happy Bus Driving & Have a very nice day/night. 😍

reviews.review_description: First bus stop the passengers act like they are boarding when they enter bus they disappear. When I pull up to next stop there's more passengers outside waiting but never board and bus does never shut. If I drive by them it dead ends and I cannot advanced.  This is a good game hope the bugs get worked out.  A mirror to see the passengers in the back would be nice...I looked for a discord but could l couldn't find it didn't want to leave this here but had no choice... keep up the good work

developer_response.body:
Hi Murda,
Thank you for your valuable review. Indeed there was a bug in that level our team has resolved that issue so kindly update to latest version of the game. And if you face any other issue or have any suggestion feel free to email us admin@tulipapps.com.
And if you feel like giving us more stars that would be great and make us very happy.

reviews.review_description: Hi thank you devs for sorting out freeze level 6 which is now sorted.  👍👍👍few glitches here and there…look forward to future updates….but good fun game.  Still find strange driving wrong side of road (UK drive on the left) but will learn …

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thanks for playing our game. We are frequently working on user suggestions. Stay tuned for further interesting updates. Hope to get 5 Star rating from you soon. Have a Good Day

reviews.review_description: is there going to be anymore updates, and why dont the front doors of the bus open, the driving seems really loose.

developer_response.body:
Hi Greeener,
Yes we are working on updates and adding different modes like parking mode off-road mode.  And we will be needing user suggestions to improve quality.  Your suggestion is noted and we shall try to implement it in future update. For suggestion feel free to email us at admin@tulipapps.com.
And if you feel like giving us more stars that would be great and make us very happy.

reviews.review_description: I bought this game today. Its a nice bus game for five bucks i would say. But the game is not like the pictures. Plus,your front door wont open (idk if its a bug or its like this)  if you like add buttons to open the doors it would be like 10 times better and add some control to the steering whell and itll be perfect.

developer_response.body: Dear Player, We are very happy & thankful to see you find our game interesting. We have noted your points and working on the improvement of front door opening bug. We are constantly striving to improve our game for our users. We have many more features planned to add in this game. Please stay tuned and keep playing. Thank you so much for your encouraging rating & valuable feedback. If you have any other feedbacks or concern please reach out to us at info@tulipapps.com. Happy Bus Driving & Have a very nice day ahead. :)
